hero.tagline: Software Solutions with AI, IoT and Mobile Technologies
hero.description: Teknofest finalist and experienced software engineer. I transform your ideas into digital products.

about.title: About
about.paragraph1: I am a graduate of Sakarya University Computer Engineering. I specialize in artificial intelligence, computer vision, and embedded systems. I gained experience through internships at companies like Venhancer, Yeditek, and ESTER.
about.paragraph2: I completed the AI-Powered Arrhythmia Detection System project as a TÜBİTAK ARDEB scholarship holder. I became a finalist and top 10 in Teknofest competitions with FEC and Prometheus teams. Currently, I am continuing my master's education and developing freelance software projects.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: Strengthen your business in the digital world with modern technologies

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: I develop performant, user-friendly mobile apps for iOS and Android using Flutter and React Native.

ai.title: AI & ML Solutions
ai.description: Automate your business processes with machine learning, deep learning, and LLM-based solutions.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Responsive, fast, and secure web applications with modern frontend and backend technologies.

iot.title: IoT & Embedded Systems
iot.description: Smart systems and prototypes with microcontrollers, sensors, and MQTT.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: Expert guidance on software architecture, technology selection, and project planning.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Mobile apps and open source projects I've developed

contact.title: Get in
contact.subtitle: Do you have a project? Would you like to work together? I'm always open to new ideas.

footer.description: Corporate and personal software solutions with AI, IoT and mobile technologies.

me.bio: An engineer who is constantly learning and improving in the software world. I'm interested in artificial intelligence, embedded systems, and modern web technologies. Creating clean and practical solutions is my passion.
me.story1: My passion for software started in high school. While studying Computer Engineering at Sakarya University, I taught Arduino and software to my friends in the robotics club. After graduating, I gained experience working at companies like Venhancer, Yeditek, and ESTER.
me.story2: Currently, I work on AI and Full Stack projects as a freelancer while continuing my master's education. As a TÜBİTAK scholarship holder, I conducted research on the AI-Powered Arrhythmia Detection project. I developed both technical and leadership skills by working with FEC and Prometheus teams in Teknofest competitions.

freelance.title: Freelance AI Engineer & Full Stack Developer
freelance.description: Large-scale data analysis services on Kafka and FastAPI-based asynchronous architecture. Modern microservices solutions with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Kafka, and Redis.

tubitak.title: Research Intern / Student Researcher
tubitak.description: AI-Powered Automatic Arrhythmia Detection System project. TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1005 - New Ideas and Products Grant scholar. Project completed.

ester.title: Mobile Developer Intern
ester.description: Sports matching platform development. Flutter with OpenStreetMap integration and geographic location-based user matching.

venhancer.title: AI Engineer and R&D Intern
venhancer.description: Agentic AI research and development. LLM and RAG-based autonomous AI systems. TensorFlow/PyTorch models for insurance data analysis.

arduino.title: Arduino Instructor
arduino.description: Weekly 3-hour in-person Arduino training. University-approved participation certificates for students.

fec.title: Team Lead & Developer
fec.description: TEKNOFEST finalist team leader. Autonomous Guided Vehicle (AGV) technologies. Custom mesh network protocol design. YOLO, Python, Flask, Flutter.

yeditek.title: Computer Vision Intern
yeditek.description: Deep learning-based software for industrial quality control. Product defect classification with 92% accuracy for Babe Metal.

prometheus.title: Co-Founder & Developer
prometheus.description: YOLOv5 deep learning model development. 10th in Turkey in the Artificial Intelligence category. Co-founder with Ertuğrul Yapan, Arda Elmacı, and Kemal Emirhan Ceylan.
